outlook.volatilityExpectation: HIGH - Negative GEX regime amplifies all moves. Dealers short gamma will accelerate price action in both directions.
outlook.summary: Market trapped in short gamma regime with -12.83B total GEX. Extreme put positioning (Monthly PCR 2.48) indicates heavy hedging but 0DTE reverse smirk suggests short-term bullish flow. Spot 663.8 sits between 660 RESONANCE support and 674-680 resistance cluster. Expect volatile swings with downside bias unless 680 breaks.

Heavy PUT concentration: 0DTE 43K OI, MONTHLY 76K OI. Mixed CALL activity creates pinning dynamics. Near 0DTE Max Pain 674 - dealer target magnet.
0DTE Max Pain level - market maker profit maximization target. Only 1.5% above spot. Strong magnetic pull in short-term expiry.

EXTREME volume: 0DTE CALL 252K vol (18x OI ratio). Massive intraday Call buying vs 28K Put OI. Institutional battle zone above spot.
Upside resistance cap: 0DTE 22K CALL OI, MONTHLY 52K CALL OI. Major dealer short call positioning limits breakout potential.
Immediate support just above spot: 0DTE 24K PUT OI with 200K volume (8x OI ratio). Active dealer hedging creates bounce dynamics.

outlook.summary: Market trapped in extreme short gamma regime with PCR > 2.0 signaling capitulation-level pessimism. All Max Pain levels (6775-6885) above spot create upward magnetic pull. Spot pinned at 6650 with massive volume (8.3x OI) suggests dealer hedging pressure. Watch 6600 RESONANCE support - breach triggers accelerated selling. Contrarian bounce possible but volatility will be extreme.

At spot. 0DTE volume 56,600 (8.3x OI) + WEEKLY 4,441 vol (3.7x OI). Dealer delta-hedging creating pinning effect. High friction zone.

outlook.summary: Market is in a short-gamma trap. Spot (24425) sits below the significant Monthly Put Wall at 24500, acting as immediate overhead resistance. 0DTE Max Pain at 24700 is the magnetic upside target, but the massive Monthly Call Wall at 25075 caps any bullish momentum. Downside acceleration is the primary risk.
